title: wolfhsm_rsa_sign shim name misleads RsaKey::raw_op call site
description: rsa.rs RsaKey::raw_op() is documented as a general RSA primitive dispatcher (PublicEncrypt, PublicDecrypt, PrivateEncrypt, PrivateDecrypt), but the underlying C shim it calls is named wolfhsm_rsa_sign. A reader of raw_op sees WolfHsmError::check(rc, "wolfhsm_rsa_sign") for decrypt and encrypt paths, which is confusing. Suggested rewrite: rename the shim in wolfhsm-sys/src/shims.c to wolfhsm_rsa_function (matching wolfCrypt's own naming for this primitive), regenerate bindings, and update the call site and error string accordingly.
